caption: A man wearing a light blue button-down shirt and a black headset with a microphone is positioned against a plain, light-colored wall. He is the only person visible in the scene. In the initial moments, he is gesturing with both hands, his left hand raised near his shoulder and his right hand extended slightly forward. As the sequence progresses, he lowers his hands and focuses his gaze downward, then looks back forward while speaking. The text "Ashish Raichur" appears in the lower-left corner of each frame. The man remains centrally framed throughout, and the setting remains static, with only his facial expressions and hand movements changing as he communicates.
